message:
feat: Implement pattern matching, iterable unpacking, and fix placeholders

ceval.zig - Pattern matching for structural pattern matching (PEP 634):
- exceptionGroupMatch(): Match exceptions against types with subclass checking
- matchKeys(): Extract values from dict by key list for mapping patterns
- matchClass(): Match subjects against class patterns for tuple/list types
- unpackIterable(): Full implementation for a, *b, c = iterable unpacking
  - Supports list, tuple, and string unpacking
  - Handles star unpacking with proper item collection
  - Proper reference counting for returned values

queue.zig - Real task_done/join implementation:
- task_done(): Decrement unfinished_tasks counter with error on underflow
- join(): Block using condition variable until all tasks complete
- Added unfinished_tasks counter and all_tasks_done condition variable

_pydecimal.zig - Real Decimal.fromFloat conversion:
- Handle special cases (NaN, Inf, zero with sign preservation)
- Use log10 to determine magnitude and scaling
- Extract up to 17 significant digits for f64 precision
- Trim trailing zeros and adjust exponent accordingly
